name: @dougbots/avenor-pi
description_en: Pi extension that registers avenor agent runs as tools in your Pi session. When you need a sub-agent to handle a well-defined task — write code, run tests, search a codebase — avenor operates in the background while you keep your session focused.
description_zh: Pi 扩展，将 avenor 代理运行注册为您 Pi 会话中的工具。当您需要一个子代理来处理明确定义的任务 — 编写代码、运行测试、搜索代码库 — avenor 在后台运行，同时保持您的会话专注。
